approval_request.status: ACTIVE — AWAITING HUMAN APPROVAL TO PROCEED
approval_request.context: Sprint 0 and Sprint 1 are COMPLETED. Sprint 2 is the current active sprint. Human must approve Sprint 2 execution before agents begin coding.

sprint.name: Sprint 2 — Customer Core Enhancement
sprint.goal: Fix critical data-display bugs (customer list empty, add-form blank), add Label/Status classification system, build Pipeline call-scheduling feature, implement Potansiyel→Müşteri atomic merge workflow, deliver all-contact-histories view, and add Dashboard analytics charts. By end of sprint the CRM is fully usable by sales reps.

db_migrations_required: ALTER TABLE "Customers" ADD "Label" integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 2;   -- 0=YuksekPotansiyel,1=Potansiyel,2=Notr,3=Vasat,4=Kotu
ALTER TABLE "Customers" ADD "Status" integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 1;  -- 0=Musteri,1=Potansiyel,2=Demo

CREATE TABLE "Pipelines" (Id uuid PK, CustomerId uuid FK, ProjectId uuid, PlannedDate timestamptz, Notes text, Status int DEFAULT 0, CreatedAt timestamptz, UpdatedAt timestamptz, IsDeleted boolean DEFAULT false)

phase_1_parallel.label: Critical bug fixes — unblock the app
backend: ION-014 — Fix customer list API (ProjectId filter bug)
frontend: ION-015 — Fix customer add form blank

phase_2_backend_then_frontend.label: New features — backend APIs first, then frontend screens

sequence.then_frontend: ION-025 — Pipeline page + Pipeline Ekle button

phase_3_dashboard.label: Dashboard — requires all above complete
both: ION-026 — Dashboard stats endpoints + pipeline widget + charts

stories.title: [BACKEND] Fix: Customer list API not returning records
stories.description: Customer screen shows 0 records despite 639 customers in Neon DB. Root cause likely: ProjectId JWT claim not parsed correctly in tenant middleware, causing EF Core query to filter on null ProjectId. Fix and verify 639 records returned.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/v1/customers returns paginated results (default page 1, size 20)
All 639 existing records visible to authenticated ProjectAdmin
SuperAdmin sees records across all projects

stories.title: [FRONTEND] Fix: Customer add form renders blank
stories.description: Müşteri Ekle page renders empty — no form fields visible. Fix React component state initialization and React Query mutation wiring to POST /api/v1/customers.
acceptance_criteria: Form displays all required fields on load
Valid submission navigates back to customer list
Validation errors shown inline

stories.title: [FRONTEND] Add customer detail, edit, and delete pages
stories.description: Three missing screens: /customers/:id (detail with contact history), /customers/:id/edit (pre-filled form), and delete confirmation dialog using shadcn/ui components.
acceptance_criteria: Detail page shows all customer fields + contact history list
Edit form pre-populates existing values
Delete shows confirmation dialog; customer removed from list after confirmation
Back navigation works correctly

stories.title: [BACKEND] Customer Label system
stories.db_migration: ALTER TABLE "Customers" ADD "Label" integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 2;
stories.description: Add CustomerLabel enum (YuksekPotansiyel=0, Potansiyel=1, Notr=2, Vasat=3, Kotu=4), EF Core migration, update DTOs/commands, add ?label= filter to GET /customers.
acceptance_criteria: Migration runs cleanly on dev Neon DB
Label field persisted on create and update
GET /customers?label=0 returns filtered results

stories.title: [BACKEND] Customer Status system
stories.db_migration: ALTER TABLE "Customers" ADD "Status" integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 1;
stories.description: Add CustomerStatus enum (Musteri=0, Potansiyel=1, Demo=2), EF Core migration, update DTOs/commands, add ?status= filter to GET /customers.
acceptance_criteria: Status field persisted on create and update
GET /customers?status=0 filter works
Existing 639 customers default to Status=Potansiyel (1)

stories.title: [FRONTEND] Label and Status badges + filters on customer list
stories.description: Colored badges for Label and Status on customer list. Filter bar with dropdown chips. Filter state persisted in URL. 5 label colors + 3 status colors.
acceptance_criteria: All 5 labels render with distinct colors
All 3 statuses render with distinct colors
Filter chips update list in real time
Filters persist in URL query string

stories.title: [BACKEND] Potansiyel → Müşteri merge endpoint
stories.description: POST /api/v1/customers/{sourceId}/merge — atomically transfers all ContactHistories and Tasks from source (must be Potansiyel) to target (Musteri), then soft-deletes source. Full EF Core transaction.
acceptance_criteria: Transaction rolls back fully on any error
Source customer soft-deleted after merge
All contact histories appear on target customer
Returns 409 if source status is not Potansiyel

stories.title: [FRONTEND] Müşteriye Bağla merge UI
stories.description: On customer detail when Status=Potansiyel: Müşteriye Bağla button → searchable customer modal → confirmation dialog → merge API call → redirect to target customer.
acceptance_criteria: Button only visible for Potansiyel-status customers
Modal is searchable (live search)
Confirmation dialog shows source and target customer names
Success redirects to target customer detail

stories.title: [BACKEND] Contact History result field + all-histories endpoint
stories.description: Add ContactResult enum (Olumlu=0, Olumsuz=1, BaskaTedarikci=2) and field. New GET /contact-histories endpoint with ?from= ?to= ?type= ?result= filters.
acceptance_criteria: Migration applied without errors
GET /contact-histories returns all project contacts, paginated
All three filters work independently and combined

stories.title: [FRONTEND] All Contact Histories page
stories.description: New /contact-histories route with table (Müşteri Adı, Tarih, Tip icon, Sonuç badge, Notlar truncated) and collapsible filter panel (date range, type chips, result chips). Row click navigates to customer detail.
acceptance_criteria: Route accessible from sidebar navigation
All three filter types functional
Mobile layout collapses filter panel

stories.title: [BACKEND] Pipeline (Arama Planlaması) CRUD
stories.db_migration: CREATE TABLE "Pipelines" (...) — see sprint2-tasks.md for full DDL
stories.description: Full CRUD for Pipelines table. POST /{id}/contact creates ContactHistory and marks Pipeline Status=Tamamlandi atomically. Default GET filter: next 7 days. Status enum: Bekliyor=0, Tamamlandi=1, Iptal=2.
acceptance_criteria: EF Core migration runs without errors
All CRUD endpoints (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE) working
/contact sub-action creates ContactHistory and marks pipeline complete atomically
Default date filter returns only next 7 days

stories.title: [FRONTEND] Pipeline page + Pipeline Ekle button
stories.description: Customer detail gets Pipeline Ekle button (drawer with date picker + notes). New /pipeline route: list grouped by date, Görüşme Kaydı Gir inline action, edit/delete. Status badges: Bekliyor (orange), Tamamlandı (green), İptal (gray).
acceptance_criteria: Pipeline items grouped by date
Görüşme Kaydı Gir creates contact and marks pipeline done
Route accessible from sidebar

stories.title: [FRONTEND+BACKEND] Dashboard — Pipeline widget + analytics charts
stories.description: Backend: GET /dashboard/stats (counts by label, by status, daily contact history last 30 days) + GET /dashboard/pipeline (next 7 days). Frontend: 4 metric cards, donut chart (by status), bar chart (by label), line chart (contact volume 30d), pipeline widget with inline Görüşme Kaydı Gir. Use recharts.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard shows 4 metric cards with real data
Pipeline widget lists upcoming calls
All charts render with real data
Mobile responsive (charts stack vertically)

risks.risk: EF Core migrations on live Neon DB may conflict with existing data
risks.mitigation: Run migrations on dev DB first. All new columns have DEFAULT values — zero data loss risk. Never use destructive DDL.

risks.risk: Merge operation (ION-020) could corrupt data if transaction not handled correctly
risks.mitigation: Explicit EF Core transaction with SaveChanges inside try/catch/rollback. Tested end-to-end before merging.

risks.risk: Customer list bug (ION-014) may have multiple causes (JWT, EF query, tenant middleware)
risks.mitigation: Backend Agent diagnoses systematically: JWT parsing → middleware → EF query → response.
Use recharts (already common in React/shadcn ecosystems); tree-shake unused chart components.

definition_of_done: npm run build passes with 0 errors
All 13 stories have passing acceptance criteria
git add -A && git commit && git push origin main completed
Dev environment verified live: customer list shows 639 records
Pipeline page shows upcoming calls grouped by date
next_steps_after_approval: 1. Backend Agent starts Phase 1: ION-014 (critical bug fix)
2. Frontend Agent starts Phase 1: ION-015 + ION-016 (parallel)
3. After Phase 1 complete: Backend Agent starts ION-017, ION-018, ION-020, ION-022, ION-024
4. Frontend Agent follows with ION-019, ION-021, ION-023, ION-025
5. Final phase: Backend + Frontend coordinate on ION-026 (Dashboard)
6. After Sprint 2 complete: Human approves before Sprint 3 begins
next_sprint_blocked_until: Human approves Sprint 2 COMPLETION and Sprint 3 plan
